title: MCP 실전 설정 예시 + mcp-check.sh 검증 (Item 1 재시도)
retry_note: Original Item 1 (2026-04-10 morning batch) was rejected at 6/10 as doc-only scaffold. Enhanced with mcp-check.sh validator mirroring the pattern used for Item 2 (post-edit-size-check) and Item 3 (diagnose.sh). Also corrected the design: Claude Code settings.json schema does NOT permit mcpServers definitions — servers live in .mcp.json at project root.

fitness.rationale: script parses .mcp.json, detects inline secrets (ghp_/sk-/sk-ant-/xoxX-/AKIA...), missing command field, overly wide args scope; exits 1 on violation; single-metric measurable (violation count)

user_approval: 2026-04-10T08:48Z — retry with enhancement per user request 'mcp 실전 설정 예시도 개선해서 달 수 있을까'
gate2_verdict: PASS (no regression; scoring dimensions untouched by scaffold+script additions)
applied_changes: src/.mcp.json.example: new scaffold with filesystem + github servers, all secrets as ${VAR} placeholders, comment block explaining copy-and-edit workflow

src/context/mcp-policy.md: 'New MCP Pre-Connection Checklist' appendix corrected to reference .mcp.json (not settings.json, per Claude Code schema), added JSON example + usage steps, notes .mcp.json must be gitignored

src/scripts/mcp-check.sh: new executable validator — awk-parses mcpServers block from .mcp.json, regex-checks for inline credential literals (5 patterns), verifies command field presence, rejects bare / or ~ args scope, HARVEST_ALLOW_MCP_UNSAFE=1 bypass
schema_correction_note: First attempt put mcpServers in src/.claude/settings.json which failed Claude Code schema validation (Unrecognized fields: mcpServers). Pivoted to .mcp.json.example as the canonical location, which aligns with Claude Code's actual MCP config model (settings.json only stores enabledMcpjsonServers / allowedMcpServers policy).

self_test_results.unit_tests: 4/4 (clean example PASS, dirty file with 4 violations BLOCK, missing file skip-OK, bypass env var skip-OK)
